operation_types.name: coffee_brewing
operation_types.description: Coffee product dispensing including espresso, americano, and other coffee-based beverages

operation_types.name: milk_product_dispensing
operation_types.description: Milk-based beverages like cappuccino, latte with frothing and heating

operation_types.name: hot_water_dispensing
operation_types.description: Hot water products from steam boiler

operation_types.name: cleaning_cycle
operation_types.description: Automatic system cleaning with cleaning balls and detergent

operation_types.name: rinse_cycle
operation_types.description: System rinse operation for startup and maintenance

subsystems.name: grinder
subsystems.description: Ceramic burr grinders for left and right bean hoppers with electronic control

subsystems.name: brewing
subsystems.description: Brewing chambers with tamping, extraction, and grounds handling

subsystems.name: hydraulic
subsystems.description: Water heating, pressure, and flow control systems including coffee and steam boilers

subsystems.name: milk
subsystems.description: Milk heating, frothing, and dispensing system with temperature control

subsystems.name: powder
subsystems.description: Powder dispensing system for chocolate and other powder products

subsystems.name: cleaning
subsystems.description: Automated cleaning system with cleaning ball dispenser and detergent detection

subsystems.name: control
subsystems.description: Electronic control system managing all operations and user interface

state_variables.name: grinder_wear
state_variables.description: Cumulative wear on ceramic burrs affecting grind consistency

state_variables.name: brewing_chamber_wear
state_variables.description: Wear on brewing chamber components affecting seal and pressure

state_variables.name: boiler_scale
state_variables.description: Limescale accumulation in boilers affecting heating efficiency

state_variables.name: milk_system_cleanliness
state_variables.description: Milk residue buildup affecting taste and hygiene

state_variables.name: extraction_efficiency
state_variables.description: Degradation of extraction quality over product cycles

state_variables.name: heating_element_efficiency
state_variables.description: Heating element degradation affecting temperature stability

state_variables.name: cleaning_ball_supply
state_variables.description: Depletion of cleaning balls affecting cleaning effectiveness

usage_profiles.name: light_commercial
usage_profiles.description: Low volume office or small cafe usage

usage_profiles.name: medium_commercial
usage_profiles.description: Medium volume restaurant or office usage

usage_profiles.name: heavy_commercial
usage_profiles.description: High volume cafe or restaurant usage

field_generation_rules.generation_logic: Select from available products based on operation type
Timestamp when product button is pressed
Start time plus extraction duration or manual stop time
Base setting adjusted for extraction efficiency degradation
Affected by grinder wear and scale buildup
Probability increases with longer extraction times

event_timing_model.notes: Events triggered by user button presses, constrained by machine state and cleaning requirements

null_field_rules.reason: Hot water products do not use coffee grinding or milk systems
Cleaning cycles are maintenance operations, not product dispensing
Pure coffee products do not use milk or powder systems
